---
name: Generic issue
about: Report a bug, request an improvement, or define a task
title: "[Issue]: "
labels: needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Type
<!-- Mark one -->
- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Improvement
- [ ] Task / Chore
- [ ] Documentation

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the issue.

## Background / Context
Why this matters, where it appears, and any relevant details.

## Current behavior
What is happening now?

## Expected behavior
What should happen instead?

## Steps to reproduce (if applicable)
1. Go to '...'
2. Click/type '...'
3. See error/behavior

## Scope / Impact
- Affected area(s):
- Affected user(s):
- Frequency: Always / Often / Sometimes / Rarely

## Proposed solution (optional)
Describe a possible fix or approach.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Behavior matches expected outcome
- [ ] No regression introduced in related flows
- [ ] Verified on affected pages/components

## Technical notes (optional)
Environment, logs, stack traces, related files/components, etc.

## References
Link related issues, PRs, docs, screenshots, or recordings.
